member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: This namespace contains classes for OPC Alarms&Events browsing in Windows Forms.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: This namespace contains classes that facilitate easy work with OPC Alarms&Events from Windows Forms applications.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select OPC-A&E event areas or sources.

remarks.para: This is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has made a selection. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.DefaultMultiSelect
member.summary: Default value of the property. Equals to true.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.MultiSelect
member.summary: Determines whether the dialog allows the user to select multiple nodes as output.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.ServerDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify and connect to an OPC server, such as the server's ProgID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.NodeDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify an OPC Alarms&Events node (area or source), such as its QualifiedName.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.AreaElements
member.summary: Contains information gathered about OPC event areas (in OPC event server's area space).

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.NodeElements
member.summary: Contains information gathered about OPC nodes (areas or sources in OPC event server's area space).

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.SourceElements
member.summary: Contains information gathered about OPC event sources (in OPC event server's area space).

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.NodeDescriptors
member.summary: Collection of node descriptor objects.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAreaOrSourceDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select OPC-A&E event attributes.

remarks.para: This is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has made a selection. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.DefaultAttributeId
member.summary: The default event attribute Id.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.DefaultMultiSelect
member.summary: Default value of the property. Equals to true.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.DefaultCategoryId
member.summary: The default event category Id.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.Reset
member.summary: Resets all properties to their default values.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.ResetAttributeIds
member.summary: Empties the collection.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.ShouldSerializeAttributeIds
member.summary: Determines whether the collection is empty.
member.returns: true if the property has changed from its default value; false otherwise.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.MultiSelect
member.summary: Determines whether the dialog allows the user to select multiple attributes as output.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.ServerDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify and connect to an OPC server, such as the server's ProgID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.CategoryId
member.summary: Event category ID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.AttributeId
member.summary: Event attribute ID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.AttributeIds
member.summary: A collection of attribute Ids.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.AttributeElements
member.summary: A collection of attribute elements (), keyed by their Attribute Ids.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.AttributeElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC event attribute.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AEAttributeDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select from OPC-A&E event categories provided by the OPC server.

remarks.para: This is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has made a selection. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.DefaultCategoryId
member.summary: The default event category Id.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.DefaultMultiSelect
member.summary: Default value of the property. Equals to true.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.Reset
member.summary: Resets all properties to their default values.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.ResetCategoryIds
member.summary: Empties the collection.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.ShouldSerializeCategoryIds
member.summary: Determines whether the collection is empty.
member.returns: true if the property has changed from its default value; false otherwise.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.DefaultEventTypes
member.summary: The default event types (corresponds to ).

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.MultiSelect
member.summary: Determines whether the dialog allows the user to select multiple categories as output.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.ServerDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify and connect to an OPC server, such as the server's ProgID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.EventTypes
member.summary: Type of event, or multiple event types combined.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.CategoryId
member.summary: Event category ID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.CategoryIds
member.summary: A collection of event category Ids.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.CategoryElements
member.summary: A collection of category elements (), keyed by their Category Ids.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.CategoryElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC event category.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryConditionDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select OPC-A&E category available on a specified event condition.

remarks.para: This is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has made a selection. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryConditionDialog.DefaultCategoryId
member.summary: The default event category Id.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryConditionDialog.DefaultConditionName
member.summary: The default event condition name.

member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.summary: Resets all properties to their default values.

member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.

member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify and connect to an OPC server, such as the server's ProgID.

member.summary: Event category ID.

member.summary: Event condition name.

member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC event condition.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.AlarmsAndEvents.Forms.Browsing.AECategoryConditionDialog.ServerFamilies

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: This namespace contains classes for OPC Data Access browsing in Windows Forms.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: This namespace contains classes for browsing using OPC "Classic" specifications in Windows Forms.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType
member.summary: One of element types used in OPC browsing, such as a computer, server, Data Access node, etc.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.None
member.summary: No element.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.Computer
member.summary: A computer element.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.Server
member.summary: An OPC server element.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.DANode
member.summary: An OPC Data Access node, i.e. a branch or leaf (item).

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.DAProperty
member.summary: An OPC Data Access (item) property.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.DAAccessPath
member.summary: An OPC Data Access (OPC-DA) access path.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.AECategory
member.summary: An OPC Alarms&Events event category.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.AEAttribute
member.summary: An OPC Alarms&Events event attribute.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.AECategoryCondition
member.summary: An OPC Alarms&Events event condition (available on specific event category).

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.AECategorySubcondition
member.summary: An OPC Alarms&Events event subcondition (available on specific event category).

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.AESourceCondition
member.summary: An OPC Alarms&Events event condition (available on specific event source).

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.AESourceSubcondition
member.summary: An OPC Alarms&Events event subcondition (available on specific event source).

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcElementType.AENode
member.summary: An OPC Alarms&Events node, i.e. an area or an event source.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.ComputerAndServerBrowsePresentation.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them are being browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select a computer and an OPC server residing on it.

remarks.para: This is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has made a selection. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.DefaultManualNodes
member.summary: Default value of the property. Equals to true.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.DefaultServerFamilies
member.summary: Default server families to be browsed. Equals to .

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.Reset
member.summary: Resets all properties to their default values.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.ManualNodes
member.summary: Determines whether the user will be allowed to add computers and OPC servers manually.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.ServerDescriptor
member.summary: Identifies the computer and the OPC server.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.ComputerElement
member.summary: Gets the information about the computer selected in the dialog box.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcComputerAndServerDialog.ServerElement
member.summary: Gets the information about the OPC server selected in the dialog box.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: This namespace contains classes that facilitate easy work with OPC Data Access from Windows Forms applications.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.ServerBrowsePresentation.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them are being browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog with various OPC nodes from which the user can select. This dialog can be configured to serve many different purposes.

remarks.para: This is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has made a selection. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultAnchorElementType
member.summary: Default anchor element type. Equals to .

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultAttributeId
member.summary: Default event attribute Id.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultCategoryId
member.summary: Default event category Id.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultConditionName
member.summary: Default event condition name.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultMachineName
member.summary: Default machine name.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultManualNodes
member.summary: Default value of the property.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultSelectElementType
member.summary: Default select element type. Equals to .

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultServerClass
member.summary: Default server class.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultEnabledServerFamilies
member.summary: Default value of the property. Equals to .

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DefaultSubconditionName
member.summary: Default event subcondition name.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AnchorElementType
member.summary: Type of the anchor element. Determines the part of the selection that is given on input and cannot be changed by the user.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.ManualNodes
member.summary: Determines whether the user will be allowed to add nodes (such as computers and OPC servers) manually.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.SelectElementType
member.summary: The type of the element that the user needs to select in order to finalize the dialog.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.EnabledServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families that can appear in the dialog.
member.remarks: The dialog further narrows the server families choice using a knowledge about the type of node to be selected.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.MachineName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of computer that is to be browsed for OPC servers.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.ServerClass
member.summary: Contains ProgID or {CLSID} of the OPC server.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DANodeDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify an OPC Data Access node, such as its Item Id.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DAPropertyId
member.summary: The identifying number assigned by the OPC server to the property.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DAAccessPath
member.summary: Specifies the access path for the OPC item.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AECategoryId
member.summary: Event category ID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AEAttributeId
member.summary: Event attribute ID.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AEConditionName
member.summary: Event condition name.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AESubconditionName
member.summary: The name assigned to the event sub-condition.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AENodeDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify an OPC Alarms&Events node (area or source)

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.ServerDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify the OPC server.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.ComputerElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about a computer.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.ServerElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC server.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DANodeElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC node (branch or leaf in OPC server's address space).

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.DAPropertyElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC property.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AECategoryElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC event category.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AEAttributeElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC event attribute.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AEConditionElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC event condition.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AESubconditionElement
member.summary: Contains information about an OPC event subcondition.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.AENodeElement
member.summary: Contains information gathered about an OPC node (area or source in OPC event server's area space).

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcBrowseDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.NamespaceDoc
member.summary: This namespace contains classes that facilitate easy work with OPC (in general) from Windows Forms applications.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select an OPC Data Access item.

remarks.para: OpcDAItemDialog is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has chosen an OPC item. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.DefaultMultiSelect
member.summary: Default value of the property. Equals to false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.Reset
member.summary: Resets all properties to their default values.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ResetNodeDescriptor
member.summary: Sets the back to its default.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ResetNodeDescriptors
member.summary: Sets the back to its default.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ResetServerDescriptor
member.summary: Sets the back to its default.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ShouldSerializeNodeDescriptor
member.summary: Determines whether is in its default state.
member.returns: true if the property has changed from its default value; false otherwise.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ShouldSerializeNodeDescriptors
member.summary: Determines whether is in its default state.
member.returns: true if the property has changed from its default value; false otherwise.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ShouldSerializeServerDescriptor
member.summary: Determines whether is in its default state.
member.returns: true if the property has changed from its default value; false otherwise.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.DefaultNodeDescriptor
member.summary: The default node descriptor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.DefaultServerDescriptor
member.summary: The default server descriptor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.MultiSelect
member.summary: Determines whether the dialog allows the user to select multiple nodes as output.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.Server
member.summary: Gets or sets OPC server that is to be browsed for OPC items.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ServerDescriptor
member.summary: Gets or sets OPC server that is to be browsed for OPC items.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.NodeDescriptor
member.summary: Contains information necessary to identify an OPC Data Access node, such as its Item Id.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.NodeDescriptors
member.summary: Array of node descriptor objects.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.SelectedNode
member.summary: Gets the information about the OPC item selected in the dialog box.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.NodeElement
member.summary: Gets the information about the OPC item selected in the dialog box.
member.remarks: The NodeElement is fully filled if the user has directly selected the item. The NodeElement is partially filled (only with the ItemId property) if the user has entered the node identification manually.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.NodeElements
member.summary: Contains information gathered about OPC nodes selected by the user.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAItemDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select an OPC Data Access property.

remarks.para: OpcDAPropertyDialog is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has chosen an OPC property. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.#ctor(System.ComponentModel.IContainer)
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.Reset
member.summary: Resets all properties to their default values.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.RunDialog(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.Server
member.summary: Gets or sets OPC server where the OPC item is located.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.ServerDescriptor
member.summary: Gets or sets OPC server where the OPC item is located.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.ItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets Id of the OPC item that is to be browsed for OPC properties.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.NodeDescriptor
member.summary: Gets or sets the OPC node (usually given by its Item ID) that is to be browsed for OPC properties.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.PropertyId
member.summary: The identifying number assigned by the OPC server to the property.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.SelectedProperty
member.summary: Gets the information about the OPC property selected in the dialog box.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.PropertyElement
member.summary: Gets the information about the OPC property selected in the dialog box.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.DataAccess.Forms.Browsing.DAPropertyDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: T:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog
member.summary: Displays a dialog box from which the user can select an OPC "Classic" server.

remarks.para: OpcServerDialog is a modal dialog box; therefore, when shown, it blocks the rest of the application until the user has chosen an OPC server. When a dialog box is displayed modally, no input (keyboard or mouse click) can occur except to objects on the dialog box. The program must hide or close the dialog box (usually in response to some user action) before input to the calling program can occur.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.DefaultMachineName
member.summary: Default machine name.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.DefaultServerClass
member.summary: Default server class.

member.name: F:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.DefaultServerFamilies
member.summary: Default server families. Equals to .

member.name: M:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes an instance of the class with Designer support.
member.param: The component container to which the new instance will be added.

member.summary: Resets all properties to their default values.

member.summary: Specifies a common dialog box.
member.param: A value that represents the window handle of the owner window for the common dialog box.
member.returns: true if the dialog box was successfully run; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.ServerFamilies
member.summary: The server family or families. Determines e.g. whether OPC Data Access servers, OPC Alarms&Events servers, other servers, or a combination of them will be browsed.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.MachineName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of computer that is to be browsed for OPC servers.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.ServerClass
member.summary: Contains ProgID or {CLSID} of the OPC server.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.SelectedServer
member.summary: Gets the information about the OPC server selected in the dialog box.

member.name: P:OpcLabs.EasyOpc.Forms.Browsing.OpcServerDialog.ServerElement
member.summary: Gets the information about the OPC server selected in the dialog box.
